textByHash.1ee9948bd60179751f4415d93a96093f8a8b9c30: You'd think so, but they always seem to be making a mess of the pods. After all, you've seen how many failures get dumped outside.
textByHash.3c32b7b41e309fc18d9de7be9c7702598ab6c979: So, how did you get this ropey old job then, Seventy Two?
textByHash.3ed2bf18be443c0253660583b288bb0c5ebf6350: Unless it's an emergency! Press the red button. Now!
textByHash.4cc2c8269d7b7281282f53e9944d400d1b3b6ff7: You fell asleep? I thought the masters made it impossible for us to fall asleep.
textByHash.966f35490b688a36eaf948c5fef953a1adc6edb2: Still, at least you got to guard upstairs! Things are always happening up there. I've been down here since I was de-podded and nothing happens down here.
textByHash.e14d2204d144cbc09a9dc1ad132f615d8dabf07b: I'm not panicking, you're panicking! Press the red button!
textByHash.f3bdf88dd054aa2668dc483773e55a73494ab4ac: Outside?! I don't even want to think about it!
